name: 3D Printing
description: Get a license to use our Prusa Mk4S and XL printers aand learn some general 3D printing know-how. About 90 minutes

name: Laser Cutter
description: Get hands-on experience with the laser cutter and how to think when designing in 2D. About 2 hours

name: PCB & ECAD
description: Learn KiCAD and how to design and order a basic PCB. Usually runs around 2 hours, but might take longer if there's many questions!

name: Vacuum forming
description: The vacuum former can produce terrific results for special applications. If you're interested, apply here with your motivation.
